name: roadie
displayName: Roadie v0.8.0 — AI Workflow Engine for Copilot
description: Turn GitHub Copilot Chat into structured workflows for bug fixes, features, reviews, refactors, docs, dependency upgrades, and onboarding.

chatParticipants.name: Roadie
chatParticipants.description: The invisible AI workflow engine. Chat naturally—Roadie handles the rest.

commands.title: Roadie: Initialize
commands.description: Manually initialize Roadie in the workspace

commands.title: Roadie: Reset
commands.description: Delete local database and reset Roadie

commands.title: Roadie: Show Stats
commands.description: Show workflow history statistics from the learning database

commands.title: Roadie: Enable Workflow History
commands.description: Start recording every @roadie run to the local learning database

commands.title: Roadie: Disable Workflow History
commands.description: Stop recording @roadie runs to the local learning database

commands.title: Roadie: Get Scan Summary
commands.description: Show the current project scan summary in the Output channel

commands.title: Roadie: Run Workflow
commands.description: Select and launch a Roadie workflow via chat

commands.title: Roadie: Doctor
commands.description: Run Roadie diagnostics and report status

commands.title: Roadie: Show Last Context
commands.description: Focus the Roadie Output channel and show the last LLM context snapshot

commands.title: Roadie: Show My Stats
commands.description: Open a Markdown document with per-intent accuracy, cancellation rates, top patterns, and most-edited files

roadie.telemetry.description: Enable anonymous, aggregate telemetry (workflow types, model tiers, success rates). Never sends code, file names, or project details.

roadie.editTracking.description: Track edits to Roadie-generated files for learning preferences. Phase 1.5 only.

roadie.workflowHistory.description: Persist workflow outcomes (success/failure, escalation patterns). Phase 1.5 only.

enumDescriptions: Tier 0 → escalate to Tier 1 on failure (default)
Start at Tier 1 (most expensive, highest quality)
roadie.modelPreference.description: Model tier preference for workflows. Does not affect escalation logic.

roadie.autoCommit.description: Automatically stage and commit Roadie-generated .github/ files. Phase 1.5 only.

roadie.testCommand.description: Custom test command override. If empty, Roadie auto-detects from package.json scripts (e.g., 'npm test', 'pnpm test').

roadie.testTimeout.description: Maximum seconds to wait for test suite execution before timeout.

enumDescriptions: Suppress all [CONTEXT] log lines in the Output channel
Log only the [CONTEXT] header (tokens, chars) — no body
Log the full context body (previous behavior)
roadie.contextLensLevel.description: Controls how much context Roadie logs to the Output channel on each LLM call.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run sync:displayNameVersion && npm run build
scripts.prepublish:test: npm run test && npm run lint && npm run build
